page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.14xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores using Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processors operating at a baseline frequency of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 224.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

A defining characteristic of this instance is its massive bundled local storage, consisting of 165,356 GB of HDD storage. This high-density storage configuration is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps. The absence of a GPU and the reliance on traditional HDD storage instead of solid-state drives indicates a design optimized for high-capacity sequential data access rather than low-latency random I/O operations.

From a resource density perspective, the inclusion of over 165 TB of local HDD storage offers a cost-effective solution for bulk data retention and sequential processing workloads. The hardware profile is designed for large-scale data warehousing, distributed file systems, log processing, and big data analytics pipelines where storage volume and network throughput are prioritized over high-speed transactional database performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.14xlarge is a storage-focused x86_64 server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 56 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processors running at 2.5 GHz, alongside 224.0 GB of system memory. The standout feature of this instance is its massive local storage capacity, offering 165,356 GB of HDD storage bundled directly with the hardware. It also provides a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps. Lacking a GPU and utilizing HDD media rather than SSDs, this server is designed for high-capacity sequential storage workloads rather than low-latency transactional applications. It is highly suitable for big data analytics, distributed file systems, and large-scale log processing where massive, cost-efficient local storage capacity is the primary requirement.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.14xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 56 Intel Xeon cores, 224 GB RAM, 35 Gbps network bandwidth, and an extensive 165,356 GB of bundled local HDD storage for large-scale sequential data workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring fifty-six dedicated cores and over one hundred and sixty-five terabytes of local HDD storage.

224.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
165,356 GB of bundled local HDD storage for massive data volumes
